backendSecret.description: Backend secret token for private API endpoints (API_BACKEND_SECRET)

post.description:
Receives LLM invocation events from LiteLLM/proxy and processes them:
- Validates and parses the StandardLoggingPayload
- Fetches active guardrails and their evaluations for the organization
- Converts messages to canonical format
- Runs configured evaluations
- Stores evaluation results and model invocation log
- Updates usage tracking

Supports both single payloads and arrays (json_array format).

requestBody.description: StandardLoggingPayload or array of StandardLoggingPayload objects

schema.description: StandardLoggingPayload or array of StandardLoggingPayload objects
StandardLoggingPayload or array of StandardLoggingPayload objects
StandardLoggingPayload or array of StandardLoggingPayload objects

post.description: Sends a user invitation email to the specified address. This is a private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET as Bearer token.
Sends a guardrail violation alert email to the specified address. This is a private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET as Bearer token.
Validates an rsk_ API key and returns organization data. Private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET.

get.description: Fetches active guardrails for an organization. Private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET.
Log drains lookup — not yet implemented for rogue-api.
Notifier lookup — not yet implemented for rogue-api.

post.description: Increments usage metrics for an organization. Private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET as Bearer token.

Accepts evaluation results for a log. DB persistence is stubbed — will be implemented once rogue-database DAL exposes insertEvaluationResults / recalculateLogScores. Private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET as Bearer token.
Creates or updates a log entry with PII redaction. Private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET as Bearer token.
Ingests an AIDR audit event, its payload data, findings, and optionally creates alerts for high/critical severity findings. Private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET as Bearer token.
Evaluate input/output against specified checks. Checks and modes are provided inline in the request body.
Evaluate input/output using an evaluation configuration looked up by guardrail_id.

Receives a LiteLLM webhook payload, extracts relevant fields, and upserts a log record. No evaluations are run - this is a data ingestion endpoint only. Private endpoint - requires API_BACKEND_SECRET as Bearer token.
